name: Iter19 — Batch review shows error state when all PR URLs return 404
description: When a user submits a batch of PR URLs that all return 404 from GitHub, the app should show error indicators for each PR and display a meaningful summary — it must NOT crash or show a blank screen.

planSteps.description: Paste three PR URLs that do not exist: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/99999991, https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/99999992, https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/99999993 — one per line
Verify the counter shows 3/5 PRs and all three URLs show a valid-format checkmark
Verify a loading or progress indicator appears
Verify each PR row eventually shows an error indicator (❌ or similar) after the 404 response
Verify the app does not show a blank page or uncaught JavaScript error — the page remains visible with the error state
